versions.version_description: Includes chords and synth melodies arranged for guitar.
This Tab Is A Simplified Version Of The Song. There Honestly Isn't Much To The Song, Chord-wise, So... Yeah.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Chords
----------
[ch]Dm[/ch]  xx0231
[ch]Am[/ch]  x02210
[ch]C[/ch]   x32010
[ch]G[/ch]   32003x

Capo 3rd fret (for piano chords or no capo version, transpose +3 using function below)


[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[Riff]

[tab]e|-----------------------------------------------|
B|-----------------------------------------------|
G|-----------------------------0-------0---------|
D|-0-0---0-2-----0-0---0-2-------2-0-----2-0---0-|
A|-----3-----0-3-----3-----0-3-------3-------3---|
E|-----------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/F[/ch]         [ch]G/E[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
     I've been tryna call[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
I've been on my own for long enough[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe you can show me how to love, maybe[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm going through withdrawals[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
You don't even have to do too much[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
You can turn me on with just a touch, baby[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
I look around and,   Sin City's cold and empty (oh)[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
No one's around to judge me (oh)[/tab]
                                N.C.
I can't see clearly when you're gone


[Chorus 1]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/F[/ch] [ch]G/E[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I  said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/F[/ch] [ch]G/E[/ch]
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust (hey, hey,  hey)[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/F[/ch]         [ch]G/E[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
   I'm running out of time[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause I can see the sun light up the sky[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
So I hit the road in overdrive, baby, oh-oh oh-oh oh[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
   The city's cold and empty (oh)[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
No one's around to judge me (oh)[/tab]
                                N.C.
I can't see clearly when you're gone


[Chorus 2]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/F[/ch] [ch]G/E[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I  said, ooh, I'm drowning in the night[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/F[/ch]
Oh, when I'm like this, you're the one I trust[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]G/E[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'm just walking by to let you know (by to let you know)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I can never say it on the phone (say it on the phone)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Will never let you go this time (ooh)[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]G/F[/ch] [ch]G/E[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I  said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch, hey, hey, hey[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/F[/ch] [ch]G/E[/ch]
                    Hey, hey,  hey[/tab]
[ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]G/F[/ch] [ch]G/E[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I  said, ooh, I'm blinded by the lights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
No, I can't sleep until I feel your touch[/tab]
